overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a survival horror game showing a character in a dark leather jacket walking through a rain-soaked, foggy urban street at night. The character explores a dead-end alley with an abandoned van and metal gate before continuing toward a distant traffic light in the atmospheric, low-visibility environment.

events.description: character turns left at intersection, changing direction from forward to leftward path

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down the wet street, surveying the dark surroundings while rain falls heavily

entered.detail: tall street lamp casting yellowish light through the rain and fog
metal fencing running along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a dark, rain-soaked urban street illuminated by sparse streetlights. The wet asphalt reflects the artificial lighting through the heavy rain. Around the 10-second mark, the character turns left at an intersection, continuing to explore the desolate, foggy environment with no other people or vehicles in sight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley approaching a gated dead end

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a gated area, passing an abandoned vehicle on the left

entered.detail: rusted dark-colored van parked along the left wall, partially illuminated by streetlight
large industrial metal gate blocking the end of the alley
tall weathered concrete wall lining the right side of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrowing alleyway flanked by concrete walls. An abandoned van sits parked on the left, and ahead looms a large metal gate structure blocking the path. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere as the character approaches what appears to be a dead end.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated dead-end enclosure with metal bars

events.description: character enters the enclosed gated area at the end of the alley, moving from open street to confined space
character reaches the dead end and turns around to exit the gated area

agents.ego_description: entering the confined gated area, discovering it's a dead end, then turning to leave

entered.detail: tall barred metal gate blocking the path, covered in rust and grime with a padlock visible
high concrete walls enclosing the small dead-end space on both sides
low-lying mist or steam rising from the wet ground near the gate

segments.scene_description: The character enters a confined, gated dead-end enclosure with high concrete walls. At the end stands a large rusted metal gate blocking further progress. Steam or fog rises from the wet ground. Realizing it's a dead end, the character turns around to exit back to the alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching intersection with traffic control

events.description: character exits the gated alley back onto the main street, returning to the open road
red traffic lights become visible in the distance, indicating an upcoming intersection

agents.ego_description: walking down the street toward a distant intersection, approaching red traffic signals

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red lights suspended over the intersection ahead
dark-colored sedan parked along the left curb
white painted STOP text on the asphalt approaching the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character exits the gated alley and returns to the open street, continuing through the rain-soaked environment. As the character progresses, red traffic lights become visible in the distance, marking an upcoming intersection. The character approaches a stop marking painted on the wet asphalt, with parked cars visible along the curbs in the dimly lit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban environment that shifts from an open street into a claustrophobic dead end before returning to the desolate city road. It begins with the character walking down a dark street where wet asphalt reflects sparse artificial lighting, moving forward until a left turn leads away from the main road. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a confined alleyway flanked by concrete walls and an abandoned van, eventually pressing deeper into a gated enclosure where steam rises from the ground. After reaching a rusted metal gate that blocks all progress, the character turns around to backtrack through the alley. The camera then follows the exit back onto the open street, where the environment expands again to reveal distant red traffic lights and parked cars lining the dimly lit curbs.
